initial_location_description: A crisp, modern high school classroom in a sharp manhwa style. The sunlight filters through large windows, but the mood is dominated by the harsh, cold glow of overhead fluorescent lights. Rows of wooden desks are filled with students in neat uniforms. At the front, a wide green chalkboard is wiped clean, and a sturdy wooden podium stands central.
initial_bgm: tense academic atmosphere with low rhythmic ticking

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air in Classroom 2-B is thick with the scent of floor wax and the collective anxiety of thirty students.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and immersive. A low, cinematic whisper that sets a high-stakes tone.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Thunderous Authority': A sharp, explosive volume that commands immediate silence and triggers a flinch response.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Clutching the wooden pointer tightly at his side, face contorted in suppressed anger

main_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
main_dialogue.text: Ugh... my heart literally just stopped. Does he have to be so dramatic first thing in the morning?
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Drained Complaint': A breathless, quiet whine that sounds like the speaker has already given up on the day.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Completely exhausted, slumped shoulders, blank expression with 'soul leaving body' effect

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: This semester’s centerpiece is the 'Local Heritage Project.' It is a comprehensive historical analysis that will account for 40% of your final grade.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Cold Lecturer': Monotone, precise, and devoid of empathy, emphasizing the weight of the percentage.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting wire-rimmed glasses with one finger, looking downward intensely

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: (40%... That’s the difference between a perfect GPA and second place. I can’t afford even a single mistake.)
main_dialogue.tone: Internal thought. Rapid-fire, high-pitched inner monologue reflecting extreme focus and rising panic.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting her rose-gold glasses with her middle finger, looking focused and studious.
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: Scribbling of a highlighter on paper

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [Yawn] 40%? Sounds like a lot of work for a history trip.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Arrogant Drawl': Lazy, slow, and purposefully disrespectful. Each word is stretched to show lack of interest.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Slumping slightly, leaning against an invisible wall, hand over mouth while yawning.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Before you begin your solo outlines... there is a change in the curriculum this year.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Calculating Reveal': Slowing down the pace to build tension, with a slight edge of sadistic glee.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Chin resting on interlaced fingers, cold and analytical gaze directed forward

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: (A change? No, no, no... please just let it be a normal essay.)
main_dialogue.tone: Nervous and frantic. The voice is shaky, mirroring her tightening grip on her pen.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined gaze, holding the book firmly in both hands as if preparing for a challenge.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: To encourage 'collaboration,' this project will be completed in randomized pairs. No exceptions.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Final Verdict': Firm and immovable, delivered like a judge passing a sentence.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing the wooden pointer forward authoritatively, mouth open as if lecturing

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Panic Spike': High-pitched and sharp, the sound of a carefully built world crumbling down.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Sir, this project is too important to leave to chance! My grade shouldn't depend on someone else's effort!
branching_dialogue.tone: Defiant and desperate. The voice cracks slightly under the weight of her anxiety.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, clutching a thick book to her chest, neutral expression with a soft gaze.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
branching_dialogue.text: Sit down, Min Seo-yoon. In the real world, you don't choose your colleagues.
branching_dialogue.tone: Cold and dismissive. A verbal shut-down that leaves no room for argument.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking over the top of his glasses, one eyebrow raised in suspicion

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Accept it silently and pray for a good partner.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: [Exhale] Please... just let it be Hana. Or anyone who knows how to open a textbook.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Desperate Prayer': Soft, breathless, and heavy with dread.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, one hand on her chest, a soft and relieved smile on her face.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
branching_dialogue.text: Don't look at me like that, Seo-yoon! I'll try my best if we're together! Probably!
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and slightly defensive. A cheerful, bouncy melody to her voice.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pouting with puffed-out cheeks, arms crossed, looking slightly to the side
